description:
Atlas demo gallery — 12 pre-lifted 3D scenes spanning 4 thesis patterns: (1) Generator-S scatter (1 prompt → N instances; carrier/cathedral/forest/coastal/village), (2) atmospheric / 1-primitive scenes (open-ocean/snow-mountain), (3) GPU-internal SDF rep distinct from generator-level scatter (canal-day1), (4) single-object precision (vase/clock/bicycle/dining). Each demo proves a specific claim in the vs-diffusion / vs-neural-world-model thesis.

PROMPT-WRITING LESSON (learned 2026-05-18 the hard way): keep prompts SHORT. The LLM has cultural / visual priors (e.g. '中国航母' → 辽宁/福建号 with starboard island, 3/4 angle). Heavy 'prompt engineering' with explicit angle / parts list overrides those priors and produces worse compositions. Trust the model.

demos.title: 盆景蚀刻山地
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint 12 (Rune Skovbo Johansen Advanced Terrain Erosion Filter, MPL-2.0) — Atlas's first CPU-baked-heightmap-to-GPU-texture pipeline. compile() bakes a 512² heightmap (height + ridgeMap + treeAmount + erosionOffset packed into RGBA32F) via Phacelle noise + 5-octave erosion, uploaded to flyLambert as sampler2D u_heightmap. New material kind='eroded-terrain' (kind=7) renders cliff/dirt/grass/snow/sand/tree/drainage by reading the 4 channels. Hash-driven (?tokenHash=0x... or scene.defaults.seed): different hashes produce visually distinct mountains via 1-3 random initial bumps + 6 jittered visual erosion params + per-hash Phacelle domain offset. NFT-ready primitive — Phase 2 adds Blueprint + BOB GPU views for the on-chain generative art triple-view product.

demos.title: Venice Canal
demos.thesisPoint: Two layers of 1→N: GPU-internal `rep` (canal buildings tiled along curve, 0 scene-tree expansion) vs Generator-S scatter (instances become separate subjects). This demo shows the former — rep + curve as procedural urban density.
demos.prompt: 弯曲水道 + 拱桥 + 亮窗

demos.title: 红岩峡谷·黄昏
demos.thesisPoint: terrain-canyon primitive (recipe-only IQ Canyon XdsXDS port) adds 3D fbm displacement overlay with Y-axis stretch 4× onto terrain-elevated heightmap — horizontal noise bands map to VERTICAL wall striations, the signature red sandstone canyon look. Mountain branch now respects material HSV hue as a rock tint (Sprint A5), so the same shader renders gray Alps OR red sandstone via material setting. Sunset lighting + god-rays + warm fog.

demos.title: 中国航空母舰
demos.thesisPoint: #1 precision · regression test

demos.title: 都市天际线
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint A7 (Otavio Good Skyline CC0 recipe port) — Atlas's first procedural-scene primitive (procedural-city). Infinite tiled skyscrapers via per-block hash + downtown bias + window-aligned floor quantization. Requires new voxel-walk raymarch (flyLambert clamps step to unit block boundaries when scene has city, otherwise sphere trace overshoots discontinuous per-block SDF). New material kind='building' (kind=6) renders procedural window grid + Schlick glass reflection + lane-marking road texture.

demos.title: 9:15 的钟
demos.thesisPoint: #1 precision · diffusion big-gun

demos.title: 海岸灯塔
demos.thesisPoint: #4 prompt simplicity · waves

demos.title: 餐桌摆设
demos.thesisPoint: #2 semantic combinatorics
demos.prompt: 餐桌上摆着一个盘子、刀叉和酒杯

demos.title: 森林·流星
demos.thesisPoint: stylized-tree 4-layer + emissive (kind=3) + translucent (kind=4) + stars + lens flares

demos.title: 哥特式大教堂
demos.thesisPoint: #1 structural precision

demos.title: 战机巡航
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint 1-8 capability convergence · full MttGz4 jet-fighter cinematic reconstruction using Atlas SceneData primitives only. HDR + DoF + motion blur + lens flare + IBL + cameraSequence + subjectMotion + attachTo + pos.relativeTo + shake.velocityScale + Blueprint-as-shot + exposure ramps. Hand-authored counterpart to rocket-launch — proves the cinematic envelope generalizes from vertical-launch to horizontal-cruise subjects.

demos.title: 湖区俯瞰
demos.thesisPoint: Recipe-only port of IQ Rainforest envelope() — terrain-with-lakes primitive carves lake-floor pockets into elevated-terrain heightfield using low-freq mask noise. Lakes are PART of the terrain (continuous Lipschitz), so ridges + valleys form naturally around them. Paired with sea-surface for actual water plane + Sprint A4 snow Schlick + Fresnel rim for crystalline alpine look. Aerial cinematic 4-shot showcase.

demos.title: 山间村落
demos.thesisPoint: #9 multi-axis variants

demos.title: 开阔的海面
demos.thesisPoint: Atmospheric · 1 SDF primitive (sea-surface) = full infinite scene. No scatter needed; minimalism is the point.

demos.title: 雨林山岭
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint A6 (recipe-only IQ Rainforest XlsBR4) — adds 5 mountain shader idioms in one batch: (1) cliff smoothstep injection (terrain-elevated new args, structural rock faces) (2) canopy mosaic (per-cell hash variation, distant terrain reads as dense tree canopy) (3) wavelength-dependent fog (RGB different extinction, distant terrain desaturates + blue) (4) cliff bump (fbm normal perturbation masked by 1-|n.y|) (5) cloud shadow projection (projected noise density gives dappled forest light). All backward-compat — existing scenes unchanged.

demos.title: 火箭发射
demos.thesisPoint: Sprint 1 cinematic showcase · HDR bloom on engine glow + DoF + lens flare + ACES tonemap. Inspired by MttGz4 jet sequence; built on the same Atlas primitives as every other demo. Proves the cinematic post-FX layer translates without changing the SDF authoring path.

demos.title: 雪覆石桥
demos.thesisPoint: First parametric building atom · arch-bridge SDF (recipe-only IQ MdXGzr port) builds vault + deck + rails + ~50 balusters + corner finials in ONE 100-LOC SDF function (vs ~60 unioned subjects = 10× perf). Pair with new material kind='snowy' = Lambert + noise-patched snow overlay + cosine micro-normal sparkle spec. Snow demo composes arch-bridge + terrain-elevated (snowy peaks) + tree-pine scatter — proves parametric building primitives integrate with existing atom composition.

demos.title: 雪山
demos.thesisPoint: Pure procedural · 1 SDF primitive (terrain-heightmap, IQ Elevated fbm) = full mountain range with snow-line shading. Zero LLM-emit subjects; the shader IS the scene.

demos.title: 花瓶
demos.thesisPoint: P1 milestone · revolution lift

demos.title: 复古自行车
demos.thesisPoint: #1 precision-content

demos.title: Wave 1-extruded typography
demos.thesisPoint: Atlas typography Wave 1-extruded atom showcase. Same 16 glyphs as Wave 1-pipe but rendered as 2D outlines extruded along Z (flat faces, sharp edges). Side-by-side with wave-1-pipe-showcase = visual proof of the extruded vs pipe atom dichotomy.

demos.title: Wave 1-pipe typography
demos.thesisPoint: Atlas typography Wave 1-pipe atom showcase — 16 glyphs (digits + KPI symbols) rendered as true 3D capsule/torus/sphere unions, not extruded 2D outlines. Demonstrates the architectural distinction (text-3d-pipe vs text-3d-extruded) shipped 2026-06-19.
demos.prompt: Wave 1-pipe atom showcase — all 16 supported glyphs in true 3D pipe style

demos.title: Cube-3D atom showcase
demos.thesisPoint: Atlas cube-3d atom L3 showcase — 4 scenes cover 5 PresentationLoad templates (Connected pipe-through row + Buzzword 4W cluster + Glass Rubik 3x3x3 grid3d + Hub-spokes selective connectorIndices). One atom × 5 templates = renderer-as-preset thesis applied to slide-deck geometry vocabulary.

demos.title: Sphere · Fill Levels
demos.thesisPoint: Atlas sphere atom family (Sprint 2) · sphere-fill-3d — glass spheres with cutSphere liquid fill levels (0..1) in a wireframe cage. Composite atom from shipped GLSL-emit primitives.

demos.title: Sphere · Network
demos.thesisPoint: Atlas sphere atom family (Sprint 2) · sphere-network-3d — central hub + satellite spheres + capsule links (network / mind-map). Composite atom.

demos.title: Sphere · Tree
demos.thesisPoint: Atlas sphere atom family (Sprint 2) · sphere-tree-3d — top-down hierarchical sphere tree with parent→child links (org / taxonomy). Composite atom.

demos.title: Sphere · Divisions
demos.thesisPoint: Atlas sphere atom family (Sprint 2) · sphere-segmented-3d — sphere split into exploded longitudinal wedges (divisions / exploded view). sphere ∩ half-planes per wedge.
